name: gpt-oss-20b
metaDescription: gpt-oss-20b (OpenAI), released 2025-08-05 — part of the gpt-oss (Open Weight) line. 21B total / 3.6B active MoE; 128K context, Apache-2.0, fits in ~16GB for on…
overview: gpt-oss-20b is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the gpt-oss (Open Weight) line. Released 2025-08-05. OpenAI's open-weight, Apache-2.0 Mixture-of-Experts models for local and on-device reasoning.
What's notable in this version: 21B total / 3.6B active MoE; 128K context, Apache-2.0, fits in ~16GB for on-device use.
